findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/ComplexLinearPart.lean:68` defines `IsComplexLinear` and lines 90/98 define its basic API, while `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/Transport.lean:124-127` states the raw `IsComplexLinear (eV.conj J) ... ↔ IsComplexLinear J ...` theorem with no `AlmostComplexStructure` hypotheses.
findings.fix: Move `isComplexLinear_arrowCongr_iff` to `TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/ComplexLinearPart.lean` near `IsComplexLinear.apply`/`isComplexLinear_of_apply`, adding the direct `Mathlib.Algebra.Module.Equiv.Basic` import there if needed; keep only the `AlmostComplexStructure` transport-specialized wrapper in this file.
findings.issue: `isComplexLinear_arrowCongr_iff` is not about almost complex structures or symplectic transport; it is a generic theorem about `TauCeti.IsComplexLinear` for arbitrary real-linear endomorphisms, so users of `TauCeti.LinearAlgebra.ComplexLinearPart` cannot get it without importing geometry.

summary: One raw linear-algebra naturality lemma is placed in the symplectic transport file instead of the existing generic complex-linearity file.
